nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Lactobacillus/Rosa Damascena Bud/(Calendula Officinalis/Dandelion/Hibiscus Sabdariffa/Jasmine/Lavender/Matricaria/Nelumbo Nucifera) Flower Ferment Filtrate
chemicalDescription: Lactobacillus/Rosa Damascena Bud/(Calendula Officinalis/Dandelion/Hibiscus Sabdariffa/Jasmine/Lavender/Matricaria/Nelumbo Nucifera) Flower Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the buds of Rosa damascena and the flowers of Calendula officinalis, Taraxacum officinale, Hibiscus sabdariffa, Jasminum officinale, Lavandula angustifolia, Chamomilla recutita, and Nelumbo nucifera, by the microooganism, Lactobacillus. The accepted scientific name for Rosa damascena is Rosa x damascena, and the accepted scientific name for Chamomilla recutita is Matricaria chamomilla.
inciName: LACTOBACILLUS/ROSA DAMASCENA BUD/(CALENDULA OFFICINALIS/DANDELION/HIBISCUS SABDARIFFA/JASMINE/LAVENDER/MATRICARIA/NELUMBO NUCIFERA) FLOWER FERMENT FILTRATE
